desc.en: Russia's oldest (1755) and most prestigious university.
desc.zh: 俄罗斯最古老（1755年）最负盛名的大学。

climate.zh: 莫斯科大陆性气候。冬季漫长寒冷（-10至-3°C），夏季温暖短暂（18-25°C）。大量降雪。
climate.en: Moscow continental climate. Long cold winters (-10 to -3°C), warm short summers (18-25°C). Heavy snowfall.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍（主楼群）约$100-200/月，非常便宜。校园是世界最大大学校园之一。
housing.en: On-campus dorms (main building complex) ~$100-200/month, very affordable. One of the world's largest university campuses.

employment.zh: 俄罗斯顶尖学府。学术和科研领域就业强势。俄罗斯大企业广泛认可。
employment.en: Russia's top university. Strong in academic and research employment. Widely recognized by major Russian companies.

healthcare.zh: 留学生需购买医疗保险（约$100-200/年）。校内有综合医疗中心。
healthcare.en: International students need medical insurance (~$100-200/year). Comprehensive medical center on campus.

application.zh: 通过学校官网或俄罗斯教育中心申请。需高中成绩、俄语/英语证明。部分项目英语授课。
application.en: Apply via website or Russian education center. Transcripts, Russian/English proficiency required. Some programs English-taught.

safetyDetail.zh: 莫斯科大城市安全状况一般。校园区域安保严格，相对安全。
safetyDetail.en: Moscow has average big city safety. Campus area has strict security, relatively safe.
